phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o balcão de peixe fresco?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW bahl-KOWN DIH PAY-shih FREHSH-koo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para Balcão de peixe fresco.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh bahl-KOWN DIH PAY-shih FREHSH-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the fresh fish counter.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the fresh fish counter.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh bahl-KOWN DIH PAY-shih FREHSH-koo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para Balcão de peixe fresco.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o talhante.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW tuh-LYAHNNG-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the meat section.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the meat section.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW tuh-LYAHNNG-tih.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o talhante.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the local cheese stalls are
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as bancas de queijo local e enchidos?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FI-kow ahs-BAHN-kahs (link: s→b) jee-KWAY-zoo (link: e→q) lo-KAHL-ee (link: l→e) en-SHEE-dooz (link: e→e)
phrases.cultural_note: Local vendors typically arrange cheese and charcuterie together near the main aisles for easy tasting.

likely_response.local: Pergunte no balcão de informações perto da entrada principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH PEHR-too DUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the information desk near the main entrance.

responses.english: Ask at the information desk near the main entrance.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH PEHR-too DUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Pergunte no balcão de informações perto da entrada principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the central courtyard seating is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o pátio central para sentar?
phrases.pronunciation: awn-djee FEE-kaw oo PAH-tyoo sen-TRAHL pah-rah sen-TAH? (liaison: "pátio central" = PAH-tyoo sen-TRAHL; "para sentar" = pah-rah sen-TAH)
phrases.cultural_note: The central courtyard serves as a communal dining space where visitors share tables during peak hours.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o pátio central.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW PAHT-yoo sayngt-RAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the central courtyard.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the central courtyard.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW PAHT-yoo sayngt-RAHL.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o pátio central.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a praça de alimentação?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH PRAH-suh DIH uh-lee-mayng-tuh-SOWN?

likely_response.translation_en: Where is the food court? It's on the upper floor.

responses.english: Where is the food court? It's on the upper floor.
